zh.lifeSummary: 當John d'Anvers II於1382年出生在英國奧可福爾班波瑞時，他的父親Richard d'Anvers II53歲，母親Agnes Brancestre23歲。他於1399年之前與Alice Verney結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1420年在英國奧可福爾被列為member of parliament。他去世於1448年1月3日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾班波瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John d'Anvers II于1382年出生在英国奧可福爾班波瑞时，他的父亲Richard d'Anvers II53岁，母亲Agnes Brancestre23岁。他于1399年之前与Alice Verney结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1420年在英国奧可福爾被列为member of parliament。他去世于1448年1月3日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾班波瑞。

nameMeanings.name: d'Anvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John d'Anvers II was born in 1382, in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Richard d'Anvers II, was 53 and his mother, Agnes Brancestre, was 23. He married Alice Verney before 1399. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1420, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Oxfordshire, England. He died on 3 January 1448, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John d'Anvers II est né en 1382, à Banbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard d'Anvers II, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Agnes Brancestre, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Alice Verney avant 1399. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1420, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 3 janvier 1448, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Banbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John d'Anvers II 1382 in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard d'Anvers II 53 und seine Mutter Agnes Brancestre 23. Er hat vor 1399 Alice Verney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1420, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament in Oxfordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. Januar 1448 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John d'Anvers II è nato il nel 1382 nel Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard d'Anvers II, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Brancestre, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Alice Verney prima del 1399. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1420, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Oxfordshire, England. Morì il 3 gennaio 1448, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Banbury, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John d'Anvers IIが1382年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアバンブリーで生まれた時，父Richard d'Anvers IIは53歳，母Agnes Brancestreは23歳であった。1399年以前にAlice Verneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1420年，38歳の時，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1448年1月3日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアバンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John d'Anvers II(이)가 1382년 영국 스퍼드실르 반버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard d'Anvers II(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Brancestre(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1399년 이전 Alice Verney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1420년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 스퍼드실르에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1448년 1월 3일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 반버이에 묻혔다.

mn.Ipwell, Oxfordshire, England: Adwell, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John d'Anvers II nasceu em 1382, em Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard d'Anvers II, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Brancestre, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Verney antes 1399. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1420, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 3 de janeiro de 1448, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John d'Anvers II родился в 1382 г. в местности банбури, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard d'Anvers II было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Brancestre, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Verney перед 1399 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1420 году, в возрасте 38 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности оксфордшир, Англия. Он умер 3 января 1448 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности банбури, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John d'Anvers II nació en 1382, en Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard d'Anvers II, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Agnes Brancestre, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Alice Verney antes de 1399. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1420, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 3 de enero de 1448, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
